name: Seller Dashboard
description: Seller management hub with listing management, performance analytics, earnings tracking, and review monitoring for marketplace sellers.

page_briefs.seller-overview: Seller home dashboard with a KPI grid showing total earnings, active listings, booking rate, and average rating. Below, a compact data table displays recent bookings and inquiries with status badges and quick-action buttons.
page_briefs.seller-listings: Full data table of all seller listings with columns for title, status (active/draft/paused), views, bookings, and price. Bulk actions allow publish, pause, or delete. A create-new-listing button sits in the top-right corner.
page_briefs.seller-listing-edit: Multi-section form for creating or editing a listing. Sections include basic info (title, description, category), pricing, photos upload zone, availability calendar, location, and amenities checklist. Save and preview buttons anchor at the bottom.
page_briefs.seller-analytics: Analytics dashboard with compact KPI cards at the top showing views, conversion rate, revenue, and response time. Below, a chart grid displays booking trends, revenue over time, and traffic sources. Sparkline cells highlight week-over-week changes.
page_briefs.seller-reviews: Data table of all reviews received with columns for listing, reviewer, rating stars, excerpt, date, and response status. Expanding a row reveals the full review text and a reply form for the seller to respond publicly.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
